title: Pest Risk and Proximity to Urban Areas and Import Centers
text:
This analysis investigates how proximity to urban areas and plant import centers affects the risk of growers encountering an invasive insect pest that affects multiple cultivated crops, including orchids.
Full analysis coming soon.
